items.title: Q3 earnings mixed as consumer sectors shine, labour codes weigh on margins
items.description: Indian companies saw mixed results in the December quarter. Consumer sectors like automobiles, banking, cement, and pharma performed well due to festive demand and GST cuts. However, labor code changes impacted profitability. Future trends will depend on rural demand, US trade measures, and raw material prices. Companies are focusing on new launches and efficiency to drive growth.
